playbook.intent: From zero to a CI-integrated eval harness that gates every prompt/tool/model change with a regression score, an adversarial pack, a cost-per-success budget, and trajectory-level OTEL traces.
playbook.scope: From zero to a CI-integrated eval harness that gates every prompt/tool/model change with a regression score, an adversarial pack, a cost-per-success budget, and trajectory-level OTEL traces.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Define What to Measure
stage.intent: Pick metrics tied to user value.

tasks.task: List metrics: accuracy, faithfulness, latency, cost, safety
Tie each metric to a buyer-visible outcome

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every metric has a tied outcome and a bar.

stage.name: Build Golden Set
stage.intent: Cases you trust as ground truth.

tasks.task: Curate 50-200 golden cases that span the workflow
Get human raters to label edge cases

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when golden set is reviewed and versioned.

stage.name: Build the Harness

tasks.task: Implement the harness to run agent vs golden cases
Wire up metric computation per run

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when harness runs end-to-end and emits stable metrics.

stage.name: Baseline + Continuous Run

tasks.task: Run the harness on every meaningful change
Block merge on regressions beyond the bar

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when a regression has actually been blocked once.

stage.name: Tune & Expand
stage.intent: Add SOTA comparisons + new failure modes.

tasks.task: Add new failure-mode cases as you find them
Benchmark against new SOTA models on a cadence
Decide: keep / extend / retire each metric

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written metric lifecycle for every metric.
